titlestmt.titleproper: Alpha Delta Phi, Cornell chapter records37-4-2101
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Julia Parker

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-02-03 18:23:17 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Alpha Delta Phi, Cornell chapter records
did.physdesc: Computer Media, Correspondence, Financial Records, Manuscripts, Publications

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

emph.ref: Series IV. G. Lauriston Walsh Files, President of Alpha Delta Phi Alumni Association

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Alpha Delta Phi, Cornell chapter records, #37-4-2101. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Not all the material in the collection is covered by this guide.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Secretary's minutes, 1897-1975; constitution and bylaws, with list of members, 1878-1926; correspondence and documents about the sale of property and the settlement of the Martin McVoy, Jr. estate, 1963-1988, and seal imprinter. Also includes "Catalogue of the Alpha Delta Phi, 1932-1956"; "The Cayugan," 1964, 1966; brochures containing messages from the faculty advisor and president, 1963-1966; initiation programs, 1964, 1965; membership roster, 1965; and photographs. Also the files of G. Lauriston Walsh as alumni association president regarding the operation and events of the fraternity.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, inscribed copy of Memorial of Samuel Eells, the founder of Alpha Delta Phi, 1873, and "Oration Delivered Before the Biennial Convention of Alpha Delta Phi Society... by Samuel Eells," 1939.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Printed song sheets with songs by Oscar L. Taylor (Class of 1881), Professor William Rufus Perkins (Hudson, 1868), William Seymour Edwards (Class of 1879), and Theodore Luqueer Mead (Class of 1877).

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the written permission of the President of the Alumni Board of Directors or his designee. Library staff will first notify the President of any requests.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Cornell chapter of Alpha Delta Phi was established at Cornell University in 1869. In 1929, the original fraternity house burned in a fire.

did.unittitle: Letter from chapter to W. H. Fox and C. E. Maniene
Letter from Prof. Tracy Peck regarding Walter R. Sherman
Letter from graduate members expressing concern over refusal to vote a charter to proposed University of California chapter
Catalogue of the Alpha Delta Phi 1832-1956
Catalogue of the Alpha Delta Phi (2 copies)
Oration delivered before the Biennial Convention of the Alpha Delta Phi Society, Samuel Eells
Cornell University Record of the Class of 1877, 1873-1923
outlines on a course in history, Andrew D. White
Alpha Delta Phi Fraternity at Cornell University - Constitution and By Laws
Secretary's minute book [Alpha Delta Phi Fraternity at Cornell University - Alumni Corporation Minutes]
Alpha Delta Phi Fraternity at Cornell University - Alumni Corporation Minutes
Alpha Delta Phi Fraternity at Cornell University - Alumni Corporation Minutes
Financial notes, correspondence, photocopy of agreement with Cornell University
List of chapters and confidential prospectus
First Annual Report of Cornell Chapter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: -Continuation on verso of item in Folder 28 of Box 8

did.unittitle: List of men to whom invitations to annual reunion were sent
Report of the delegates to the 45th convention of the Cornell chapter
Incorporation of Alpha Delta Phi at Cornell
Subscriptions to the house fund and hall chandelier
Contact sheets, general info, traditions and history, international policy
Series IV. G. Lauriston Walsh Files, President of Alpha Delta Phi Alumni Association
ACEF Foulkes correspondence and trustee meetings
Sword and Spear ADP active chapter
Group and composite photographs, fraternity house and house fire, campus buildings including Rice Hall, Teagle Hall and Observatory
Photograph album, including road renovations, Howie Schaffer, group and misc.
Empty photo album - photos removed and placed in Box 8
Alpha Delta Phi Photo Album, assembled by William P. Abbott

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photos of faculty during the time, including Ezra Cornell, A. D. White, Willard Fiske, Goldwin Smith; Cornell crew team of 1875 and Taughannock Falls prior to rock fall

did.unittitle: Alpha Delta Phi Photo Album, assembled by Richard H. Cobb

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photos of fraternity house including interior shots and the fire that destroyed the Chi Psi house, the "goat house", other miscellaneous photos candid/group shots and canon fire on campus

did.unittitle: Photos of initiation weekend 2004 and misc.
Photos of fraternity house and misc.
The Face behind the Mask, by John Minahan
2 CDs containing 2 photos of paintings by Louis Agassiz Fuertes: "Owl" (CD-1960) and Duck Marsh Scene (CD-1961)

originalsloc.head: Existence and Location of Originals
originalsloc.p: These paintings hung in the fraternity, but were given to the Laboratory of Ornithology in September of 2010.

did.unittitle: Song books and CD of songs (CD-1962)
Alpha Delta Phi at Cornell, Inc.
Dinner for James E. Rice, Jr. and his 1926 certificate of membership
